inst✝² : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝¹ : CompleteSpace H
α : Type u_3

E : @ResolutionOfIdentity α inst✝ H inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹
x : H
w₁ w₂ : Set α
h : w₁ ⊆ w₂
⊢ ‖(@ResolutionOfIdentity.measureOf' α inst✝ H inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ E w₁) x‖ ≤
    ‖(@ResolutionOfIdentity.measureOf' α inst✝ H inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ E w₂) x‖

failed_attempts:
by_cases hm₁ : MeasurableSet w₁ <;> by_cases hm₂ : MeasurableSet w₂
    · have hw : w₁ ∩ w₂ = w₁ := Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left h
      have hinter := E.m_Inter' hm₁ hm₂
      rw [hw] at hinter
      sorry
    · rw [E.not_measurable' hm₂]
      simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.zero_apply, norm_zero]
      exact norm_nonneg _
    · rw [E.not_measurable' hm₁]
      simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.zero_apply, norm_zero]
      exact norm_nonneg _
    · rw [E.not_measurable' hm₁]
      simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.zero_apply, norm_zero]
      exact norm_nonneg _
